name: Swift Swiss Steak
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon dried savory or marjoram, crushed
medium green pepper (sweet), cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, stir together flour, onion salt, and pepper.
2. Dip steaks into the flour mixture, coating both sides.
3. In a large skillet, brown meat, half at a time, in hot oil. Drain off fat.
4. Add undrained tomatoes, tomato sauce, and savory or marjoram to skillet. Bring to boiling; reduce heat.
5. Cover and simmer for 25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Add green pepper; cover and simmer for 5 to 7 minutes more or until meat and green pepper are tender.
7. Transfer meat to a serving platter, reserving juices. Keep warm.
8. Skim fat from juices; pour juices over meat.
9. If desired, garnish with fresh marjoram.
10. Serve meat with noodles.
